keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Johan Mojica (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Utkir Yusupov (Uzbekistan).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Abdukodir Khusanov (Uzbekistan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Uzbekistan 0, Colombia 1. Daniel Muñoz (Colombia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Luis Díaz with a through ball.
Substitution, Uzbekistan. Dostonbek Khamdamov replaces Oston Urunov.
Substitution, Uzbekistan. Farrukh Sayfiev replaces Sherzod Nasrullaev.
Goal! Uzbekistan 1, Colombia 1. Abbosbek Fayzullaev (Uzbekistan) header from very close range to the top left corner.
Goal! Uzbekistan 1, Colombia 2. Luis Díaz (Colombia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Gustavo Puerta.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Colombia. Jaminton Campaz replaces James Rodríguez.
Delay in match because of an injury Rustam Ashurmatov (Uzbekistan).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Uzbekistan. Jakhongir Urozov replaces Rustam Ashurmatov because of an injury.
Substitution, Uzbekistan. Azizbek Amonov replaces Abbosbek Fayzullaev.
Substitution, Colombia. Richard Ríos replaces Gustavo Puerta.
Substitution, Colombia. Cucho Hernández replaces Luis Suárez.
Substitution, Colombia. Andrés Gómez replaces Luis Díaz.
Substitution, Colombia. Kevin Castaño replaces Jhon Arias.
Substitution, Uzbekistan. Igor Sergeev replaces Eldor Shomurodov.
Goal! Uzbekistan 1, Colombia 3. Jaminton Campaz (Colombia) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Cucho Hernández with a cross.
